---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
---
```{=html}
<!-- Three.js Library -->
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r134/three.min.js"></script>

<canvas id="bg-canvas" style="position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; z-index: -1;"></canvas>

<!-- SECTION 1: Space Theme -->
<section id="section-space" class="theme-section">
  <div class="hero-section">
    <h1 class="hero-title">Hello, I'm <span class="hero-highlight">Lemon</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">A digital notebook exploring mathematics and its applications.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="transition-1"></div>

<!-- SECTION 2: Minimalist Academic -->
<section id="section-academic" class="theme-section">
  <div class="academic-container">
    <div class="section-title">
      <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; color: #1a1a1a;">Mathematical Philosophy</h2>
    </div>
    <p class="academic-text">
      Mathematics is not merely a tool for computation, but a rigorous language for expressing the structures of the universe. Here, we explore the intersection of pure mathematics and modern computational algorithms.
    </p>
    <div class="academic-grid">
      <div class="academic-card">
        <h3>Optimization</h3>
        <p>Mathematical methods, iterative algorithms, and frameworks for finding optimal solutions.</p>
        <a href="notes/optimization.html" class="academic-btn">Explore Notes</a>
      </div>
      <div class="academic-card">
        <h3>Probability</h3>
        <p>The fundamental mathematics of uncertainty, random variables, and probability distributions.</p>
        <a href="notes/probability.html" class="academic-btn">Explore Notes</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="transition-2"></div>

<!-- SECTION 3: Dark Glassmorphism -->
<section id="section-glass" class="theme-section">
  <div class="glass-gradient-blob"></div>
  <div class="section-title" style="margin-bottom: 3rem; text-align: center;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #fff;">Notes & Explorations</h2>
  </div>
  
  <div class="glass-grid">
    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Linear Algebra</h3>
      <p>Foundational concepts of vector spaces, matrix representations, and geometric transformations.</p>
      <a href="notes/linear-algebra.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>
    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Matrix Decompositions</h3>
      <p>Core algorithms and theorems for factorizing matrices into fundamental components.</p>
      <a href="notes/matrix-decompositions.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>
    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Reinforcement Learning</h3>
      <p>Formal frameworks for sequential decision-making, dynamic programming, and agent-based learning.</p>
      <a href="notes/reinforcement-learning.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<script src="/assets/bg-contour.js"></script>
<script src="/assets/card-tilt.js"></script>
```
